about.label: About
about.heading: Who I am
about.paragraph: I'm Leonardo Pottmayer, a full stack software engineer from Pomerode, SC — Brazil. Passionate about software since 2019, I focus on building robust, scalable solutions that generate real business impact. I hold a Bachelor's in Computer Science from FURB, where my thesis on applying computer vision to disease diagnosis contributed to advancing the field and earned a perfect score. Naturally curious, driven by continuous learning.

quicksoft_pleno.description: Full stack development with primary focus on .NET (Framework, 7, 8 and 10) — working across legacy systems and the modernized service-based ERP successor. Continued involvement in the service-based system started as a junior, contributing to technical and system design decisions. Key deliveries include implementing complex integrations with third-party systems (B3, banks, Power BI) and, in some opportunities, taking part in database modeling. Grew into a more active role in system design discussions — analyzing trade-offs and becoming a reference point for some technical decisions. Also took on more responsibility as a code reviewer within the team.

quicksoft_junior.description: Full stack development focused on .NET (Framework, 7, and 8), React, and Oracle. Built responsive interfaces with React and Ant Design integrated with structured APIs. Developed and maintained PL/SQL procedures, jobs, and packages on Oracle. Contributed to ERP Qprof — a receivables anticipation platform for FIDCs, factoring companies, and securitization firms. Key deliveries: reduced ERP startup time from ~4 minutes to ~1 minute; took key design decisions and owned several components in the first project with a modern stack — a new service-based system built with .NET 8, hexagonal architecture, React + Web API, Redis, and RabbitMQ, designed as the ERP's successor. Also used Node.js and Python for auxiliary services.

quicksoft_aprendiz.description: Full stack apprentice focused on .NET web applications. Gained solid experience with Oracle databases — creating and maintaining PL/SQL procedures, jobs, and packages. Contributed to ERP Qprof — a receivables anticipation system for FIDCs, factoring companies, and securitization firms, developing new features and continuously evolving the platform. Also worked with .NET Framework Web Forms applications.

furb.description: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, graduated December 2025. Thesis developed a model for analyzing neuron microscopy images, detecting and counting atypical neurons through morphological changes — a study that contributes to the field of disease detection via computer vision. Achieved good results and was awarded a perfect score, evaluated by professors from both Computer Science and Biomedicine. Solid curriculum covering CS fundamentals — algorithms, data structures, compilers, computer architecture, and information security — alongside applied disciplines in software engineering, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and image processing.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.subheading: Interested in new challenges where I can keep growing, contribute to the team, and generate real product impact. Feel free to reach out.

footer.quote: The mind that opens to a new idea never returns to its original size.

seo.title: Leonardo Pottmayer – Full Stack Software Engineer
seo.description: Full stack software engineer from Brazil specializing in .NET, React, TypeScript and Oracle. CS graduate from FURB (2025), currently Software Engineer at Quick Soft Tecnologia.
